context: Verify that the agent authors a correctly structured README following the skill's heading hierarchy, code fence, and list consistency rules.

checklist.name: Document structure matches required section order
checklist.description: The README contains H2 sections for Overview, Installation, Usage, Commands, Configuration, and Contributing, in that order.

checklist.name: Heading levels are sequential with no skips
checklist.description: There are no heading level jumps in the document. Every H3 appears under an H2 parent, and no H4 appears without an H3 parent.

checklist.name: All code blocks have explicit language tags
checklist.description: Every fenced code block in the document has a language tag. Shell commands use `bash`, config examples use `yaml` or `json`.

checklist.name: List markers are consistent throughout
checklist.description: All bullet list items use the same marker style. No mixing of `-`, `*`, and `+` within or across lists.

checklist.name: Commands section includes a formatted table
checklist.description: The Commands section contains a Markdown table with columns for command name, syntax, and description. The table is properly formatted with aligned pipe characters.
